svg.text: Supplementary Figure S2. Spearman correlation matrix
Main continuous predictors in eICU and MIMIC-IV; weak pairwise correlations support low collinearity concern
Diagonal cells are neutral gray; the off-diagonal color scale is capped at +/-0.4 to reveal weak-to-modest variation.
All off-diagonal absolute rho values are <=0.30, so darker cells do not indicate strong correlation; VIF diagnostics are in Supplementary Table S8.
